Begin.workOrder: Make a lot of noise in support of the AFFS!
Begin.contractMessage: Commander, our duty on this mission is to come in with the Flag of {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Name}, Plant it on some mechs or tanks we have destroyed and leave.

InvasionBegins.popupMessage: {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} has begun the full-scale invasion of this planet, Commander {COMMANDER.LastName}. We don't have to get involved but we're already here so it's at least worth considering.  But wait until we get paid to decided if you want to still support them.

PaymentDelivered.popupTitle: The Base Commander Sends Their Thanks
PaymentDelivered.popupMessage: Our payment was just delivered, Commander.  {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} is overall happy with our performance. Oh, and they sent a couple bottles of the local flavor for us to enjoy, I'm sure it's "wonderful".
